name: Volatility & Event Risk Scanner
description: Daily (7 AM ET, Mon-Fri): Checks short-term watchlist stocks for upcoming earnings, ex-dividend dates, and unusual volatility. Creates risk warnings to prevent holding through events unintentionally.

parameters.content:
## Volatility & Event Risk Scanner

Required: postgresApi
Flags earnings and ex-div dates within 5 days
for short-term watchlist stocks

parameters.query: SELECT e.ticker, e.report_date, e.fiscal_quarter, t.company_name FROM earnings_calendar e JOIN watchlists w ON e.ticker = w.ticker AND w.strategy = 'short_term' JOIN tickers t ON e.ticker = t.ticker WHERE e.report_date BETWEEN CURRENT_DATE AND CURRENT_DATE + INTERVAL '5 days'

SELECT d.ticker, d.ex_date, d.amount, t.company_name FROM dividend_history d JOIN watchlists w ON d.ticker = w.ticker AND w.strategy = 'short_term' JOIN tickers t ON d.ticker = t.ticker WHERE d.ex_date BETWEEN CURRENT_DATE AND CURRENT_DATE + INTERVAL '5 days'

parameters.jsCode: return $input.all().filter(i => i.json.ticker).map(i => ({json: {ticker: i.json.ticker, alert_type: 'earnings_risk', message: `EVENT RISK: ${i.json.company_name} (${i.json.ticker}) reports earnings on ${i.json.report_date} (${i.json.fiscal_quarter}). Close or reduce position before earnings unless intentionally playing the event.`, severity: 'warning'}}));

return $input.all().filter(i => i.json.ticker).map(i => ({json: {ticker: i.json.ticker, alert_type: 'exdiv_risk', message: `EVENT RISK: ${i.json.company_name} (${i.json.ticker}) goes ex-dividend on ${i.json.ex_date} ($${i.json.amount}). Price typically drops by dividend amount on ex-date.`, severity: 'info'}}));

parameters.query: INSERT INTO alerts (ticker, alert_type, strategy, message, severity) SELECT '{{$json.ticker}}', '{{$json.alert_type}}', 'short_term', '{{$json.message}}', '{{$json.severity}}' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM alerts WHERE ticker='{{$json.ticker}}' AND alert_type='{{$json.alert_type}}' AND triggered_at::date=CURRENT_DATE);
